source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image>Caption:
Seismic interpretation paralleling the RVG basin (longitudinal trend). Abbreviations: BRAK $=$ Brakel; KWK $=$ Kerkwijk; WWK $=$ Waalwijk;  ${\mathsf{S M G}}={\mathsf{S}}$ t-Michielsgestel; NLLF: Landen Formation; NLFF $=$  Dongen Formation; NMRF $=$ Rupel Formation; NMVFV $=$ Voort Member; NMVFO $=$  Veldhoven Clay Member. Units 1 – 4 with the newly proposed stratigraphic names as described in the text.
Question:
What is the stratigraphic name proposed for Unit 3?
